events.text: Substitution, Portugal. Diogo Dalot replaces João Cancelo.
Substitution, Portugal. Rafael Leão replaces João Félix.
Substitution, Spain. Ferran Torres replaces Álex Baena.
Substitution, Portugal. Francisco Conceição replaces Pedro Neto.
Substitution, Portugal. Bernardo Silva replaces Vitinha.
Substitution, Spain. Fabián Ruiz replaces Pedri.
Substitution, Spain. Mikel Merino replaces Dani Olmo.
Bernardo Silva (Portugal) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Goal! Portugal 0, Spain 1. Mikel Merino (Spain) left footed shot from the centre of the box to the bottom left corner. Assisted by Ferran Torres with a through ball.
Renato Veiga (Portugal) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Substitution, Spain. Borja Iglesias replaces Mikel Oyarzabal.
Ferran Torres (Spain) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Second Half ends, Portugal 0, Spain 1.
Substitution, Belgium. Jérémy Doku replaces Dodi Lukébakio.
Substitution, Belgium. Romelu Lukaku replaces Charles De Ketelaere.
Malik Tillman (USA) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Delay in match for a drinks break.
Delay over. They are ready to continue.
Substitution, USA. Ricardo Pepi replaces Tyler Adams.
Substitution, Belgium. Alexis Saelemaekers replaces Leandro Trossard.
Substitution, Belgium. Axel Witsel replaces Nicolas Raskin.
Substitution, USA. Max Arfsten replaces Antonee Robinson.
Substitution, USA. Haji Wright replaces Folarin Balogun.
Goal! USA 1, Belgium 4. Romelu Lukaku (Belgium) right footed shot from the left side of the box to the bottom right corner. Assisted by Hans Vanaken.
Second Half ends, USA 1, Belgium 4.
Substitution, Argentina. Gonzalo Montiel replaces Nahuel Molina.
Substitution, Egypt. Trezeguet replaces Haissem Hassan because of an injury.
Goal! Argentina 1, Egypt 2. Cristian Romero (Argentina) header from the centre of the box to the top right corner. Assisted by Lionel Messi with a cross.
Substitution, Egypt. Omar Marmoush replaces Mostafa Zico.
Goal! Argentina 2, Egypt 2. Lionel Messi (Argentina) left footed shot from the centre of the box to the high centre of the goal. Assisted by Gonzalo Montiel.
Goal! Argentina 3, Egypt 2. Enzo Fernández (Argentina) header from the centre of the box to the bottom right corner. Assisted by Lautaro Martínez with a cross following a fast break.
Mostafa Shobeir (Egypt) is shown the yellow card.
Hamdi Fathy (Egypt) is shown the yellow card.
Substitution, Argentina. Facundo Medina replaces Julián Alvarez.
Substitution, Argentina. Nicolás Otamendi replaces Cristian Romero.
Substitution, Egypt. Zizo replaces Mohanad Lasheen.
Marwan Attia (Egypt) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Haissem Hassan (Egypt) is shown the yellow card.
Davinson Sánchez (Colombia) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Substitution, Switzerland. Zeki Amdouni replaces Fabian Rieder.
Miro Muheim (Switzerland) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Delay in match because of an injury Jhon Lucumí (Colombia).
Delay over. They are ready to continue.
Substitution, Colombia. Yerry Mina replaces Jhon Lucumí because of an injury.
Second Half Extra Time ends, Switzerland 0, Colombia 0.
Penalty Shootout begins Switzerland 0, Colombia 0.
